stories.headline: WHO Declares Congo Ebola Outbreak Global Health Emergency
stories.summary: The World Health Organization declared an Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern, warning that a rare virus strain with no approved vaccine or treatment may already be spreading more widely than detected.

stories.headline: GOP senator who voted to convict Trump in impeachment trial loses primary
stories.summary: Sen. Bill Cassidy of Louisiana failed to make the runoff in his GOP Senate primary five years after his vote to convict Donald Trump, which led the president to call for his ouster.

stories.headline: Cassidy Loses Senate Primary in Louisiana, as Trump Vanquishes G.O.P. Foe
stories.summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, a two-term Republican who voted to convict President Trump in his 2021 impeachment trial, could not muster enough votes to continue to a runoff next month.

stories.headline: Philippines Asks Court to Deny Petition of Senator Sought by ICC

stories.headline: Returning from China, Trump is Ambiguous Over Taiwan

Bloomberg White House Correspondent Courtney Subramanian and Reporter Michelle Kaske joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the summit’s deals, sticking points and unfinished business. (Source: Bloomberg)
